sections.paragraph:
περιοικέω to live near and around, be in the neighborhood of w. acc. of pers. (Hdt. 5, 78; Aristoph., Equ. 853; Jos., Bell. 1, 63) οἱ περιοικοῦντες αὐτούς their neighbors Lk 1:65.—Renehan ’82, 116.

acc. acc. = accusative

pers. pers. = person(s)

Hdt. Hdt. = Herodotus, V b.c.—List 5

Aristoph Aristoph , V–IV b.c.—List 5

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

Renehan Renehan = RR., Greek Lexicographical Notes—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 802
